initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM item
LEFT JOIN store_sales ON item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim ON (store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk OR web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk)
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY i_category ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 
        NULLIF(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM item
LEFT JOIN store_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim AS web_date ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    (date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2)
    OR (web_date.d_year = 2001 AND web_date.d_moy = 2)
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / 
    NULLIF(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM 
    store_sales
    FULL OUTER JOIN web_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
    JOIN item ON COALESCE(store_sales.ss_item_sk, web_sales.ws_item_sk) = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON (store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk OR web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk)
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
GROUP BY 
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim AS web_date ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
    AND web_date.d_year = 2001
    AND web_date.d_moy = 2
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category
ORDER BY 
    item.i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM item
LEFT JOIN store_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim web_date ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    (date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2) OR 
    (web_date.d_year = 2001 AND web_date.d_moy = 2)
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / 
    NULLIF(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM 
    store_sales
    FULL OUTER JOIN web_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
    JOIN item ON COALESCE(store_sales.ss_item_sk, web_sales.ws_item_sk) = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON (store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk OR web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk)
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
GROUP BY 
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

candidates.sql:
WITH sales_by_category AS (
    SELECT 
        item.i_category,
        SUM(CASE WHEN store_sales.ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales
    FROM 
        item
        LEFT JOIN store_sales ON item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
        LEFT JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk AND date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
        LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
        LEFT JOIN date_dim AS web_date ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date.d_date_sk AND web_date.d_year = 2001 AND web_date.d_moy = 2
    WHERE 
        (store_sales.ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL OR web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL)
    GROUP BY 
        item.i_category
)
SELECT 
    i_category,
    store_sales,
    web_sales,
    store_sales / NULLIF(web_sales, 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM 
    sales_by_category
ORDER BY 
    i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH monthly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        item.i_category,
        SUM(CASE WHEN store_sales.ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales
    FROM 
        item
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ON item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    LEFT JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk AND date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
    LEFT JOIN date_dim AS web_date ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date.d_date_sk AND web_date.d_year = 2001 AND web_date.d_moy = 2
    GROUP BY item.i_category
)
SELECT 
    i_category,
    store_sales,
    web_sales,
    store_sales / NULLIF(web_sales, 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM 
    monthly_sales
ORDER BY 
    i_category ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH store_sales_2001_feb AS (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, ss_ext_sales_price
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
),
web_sales_2001_feb AS (
    SELECT ws_item_sk, ws_ext_sales_price
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
)
SELECT 
    i.i_category,
    COALESCE(SUM(s.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS store_sales,
    COALESCE(SUM(w.ws_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_sales,
    COALESCE(SUM(s.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(w.ws_ext_sales_price), 0), 0) AS store_to_web_ratio
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN store_sales_2001_feb s ON i.i_item_sk = s.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales_2001_feb w ON i.i_item_sk = w.ws_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category ASC
LIMIT 100
